title: AuthX Velocity
description: A velocity-based authentication plugin that allows mojang, password, and even third-party authentications to exist at the same time
body:
An authentication system that is fast, reliable, and convenient for Mojang, Yggdrasil, and offline players at the same time.

## Features
- Password-based authentication for offline users
- Seemless quick login with mojang/yggdrasil
- Automatically distinguishes offline/online mode player
- Virtual authentication world with LimboAPI
- Intuitive instructions & fully translatable

## Installation
- Put the plugin .jar file into your velocity's plugin folder
- Put the newest version of [LimboAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/limboapi) into your velocity's plugin folder
- Restart your velocity
- Change the configuration if you wish :)
  - Any change in the config/lang files can be refreshed via /authx reload

## Issues

Please report any issue found or any suggestion in the [project's issue tracker](https://github.com/MinecraftServerUnion/AuthX/issues). Please attach the complete server log since server startup.
